name: PER_SENSITIVE_DATA_AUDIT
description: This table is new for Fusion, and has been created to store the sensitive data audit.

columns.Name: AUDIT_ID
columns.Comments: System Generated Primary Key

columns.Name: AUDIT_DATE
columns.Comments: Date indicating when this audit information is logged

columns.Name: AUDIT_TIME
columns.Comments: Time indicating when this audit information is logged

columns.Name: BROWSER
columns.Comments: User Agent Parsed for browsername Firefox/Google Chrome/

columns.Name: OPERATING_SYSTEM
columns.Comments: User Agent Parsed for OS and Version Example (apple mac os x 10.14.6)

columns.Name: DEVICE_TYPE
columns.Comments: User Agent Parsed for Device Type

columns.Name: DEVICE_NAME
columns.Comments: User Agent Parsed for Device Name

columns.Name: IP_ADDRESS
columns.Comments: TrueClient IP header set by oracle Load Balancer captured by applcore session. Example:192.10.3.19

columns.Name: VIEWER_USER_NAME
columns.Comments: Username from the applcore session

columns.Name: VIEWER_PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Person ID of the logged in person

columns.Name: VIEWED_PERSON_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Person Number of the person whose data is accessed.

columns.Name: VIEWED_PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Person ID of the person whose data is accessed.

columns.Name: VIEWED_PAGE_TITLE
columns.Comments: Title of the page where the PII data is present

columns.Name: VIEWED_PII_DATA_TYPE
columns.Comments: Type of PII data

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.
